name: ruixen-chapter-scrubber
title: Ruixen Chapter Scrubber
author: Ruixen UI
description: Navigates a caller-provided chapter list through a compact magnifying rail with a contextual preview.

changes: Repointed the source utility import to the copied Ruixen utility subset.
Bounded caller geometry and the roving focus index, and added pointer cancellation handling.
Replaced animated width, top, and motion shorthand updates with origin-aware transform strings and made repeated keyboard navigation settle immediately.
Copied only the source cn helper and its clsx and tailwind-merge imports, omitting unrelated application metadata, environment, fetch, date, and text helpers.

license.scope: registry/ruixenui/chapter-scrubber.tsx and the cn subset of lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Moved all continuous visual movement to origin-aware transform strings, bounded dynamic inputs, and made arrow-key traversal immediate.
modifications.reason: Preserve the source magnifying-rail interaction while avoiding layout animation, keyboard lag, invalid geometry, and stale pointer state.

modifications.change: Reduced the source application utility file to the exact cn closure used by the component.
modifications.reason: Avoid shipping unrelated Next-specific application code while preserving the source class-merging behavior.
